subject: English
title: Weathering the Storm in Ersama – Medium Short Notes

key_points: The super cyclone of 1999 caused massive destruction in Orissa
Prashant survived by taking shelter on a roof during the storm
He walked through floodwaters to reach his village
The Red Cross shelter became a refuge for thousands of villagers
Prashant organised volunteers to distribute food and help victims
characters: Prashant – Shows courage, determination, and leadership during the disaster
Village Women – Care for orphaned children and help rebuild the community
Youth Volunteers – Help clean shelters and support injured villagers
literary_devices: Imagery – Descriptions of floating bodies and destroyed houses
Symbolism – The shelter symbolises safety and unity
exam_tips: Explain the destruction caused by the cyclone
Describe Prashant’s journey back to his village
Mention the importance of the Red Cross shelter
Include examples of leadership and cooperation
